name: Princess Chicken- Szechuan
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken with the broad side of a cleaver and cut into 1-inch pieces.
2. In a medium bowl, combine cornstarch and soy sauce. Add the chicken and mix well. Let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Remove stems from dried peppers.
4. Combine seasoning sauce ingredients in a small bowl and mix well. Set aside.
5. Heat oil in a wok over high heat for 1 minute. Stir-fry chicken pieces for about 2 minutes until very lightly browned. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain over the wok. Set aside.
6. Remove oil from the wok, leaving 2 tablespoons. Heat over medium heat. Stir-fry peppers and peppercorns until peppers turn dark brown. Add ginger and cooked chicken; stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Add the seasoning sauce to the wok and stir well. Cook until the sauce thickens slightly. Remove from heat and stir in peanuts.
8. Serve hot. Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
